name: WP-L12-mobile-logic-bugs: small mobile logic/UX bug batch
description: Bug batch traveling with the l10n-a11y surface (slice decisions: F-123 and F-172 ruled to stay in PRG-12 — tracker §1). Findings: F-123 (REMOVE dormant web ChatShell voice controls bound to stale session handlers — stale-instance removal, not a fix) · F-160 (sample-lesson buttons stay permanently disabled — missing submitting reset) · F-161 (non-answer substring matching misclassifies substantive answers — locale false positives) · F-165 (masteryScore query param not NaN-guarded — BUG-813 sweep completion) · F-168 (subjectId route param not normalized for array case) · F-172 (recall-test submit and dont-remember use independent in-flight guards — double-submit race) · F-175 (sessionStorage write executed during render — move to effect). Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: Each bug fixed with a co-located regression test; F-123 instance fully removed with project-wide grep for orphaned refs (Code Quality Guards: clean up all artifacts).
riskImpact: M / seven small behavioral fixes — per-fix regression tests required.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-L12-mobile-logic-bugs)
Transcribed from the PRG-12 execution tracker §1 (_wip/l10n-a11y/execution-tracker.md @ 9570f5b63) — bundle #6 of 8 (pulled forward as the tracker-sanctioned safe parallel lane alongside WP-1). Children are absorbed provenance (lifecycle rides this parent): WI-644 / WI-645.
Bundle rationale
Small mobile logic/UX bug batch traveling with the l10n-a11y surface. Slice rulings (tracker §1): F-123 stays here as a stale-instance REMOVAL (not a fix); F-172 stays here despite being a logic bug (small single-screen fix; PRG-11 activates much later). Held at P2 because F-123 is a HIGH_BUG.
Strategy
Independent, surgical per-bug fixes, each with a co-located regression test demonstrated red against the pre-fix code (red-green discipline). F-123: remove the dormant web ChatShell voice-control instance entirely and grep the whole project for orphaned refs (types, imports, handlers, keys) per Code Quality Guards. No drive-by refactors; every changed line traces to one of the seven findings.
Scope
In: F-123, F-160, F-161, F-165, F-168, F-172, F-175. Out: ALL string/i18n routing (WI-621's surface, in flight — avoid en.json unless a fix forces a new user-visible string); date/locale fixes F-177/F-178 (WI-627); anything touching the announcement surfaces just landed by WI-622.
Findings
F-123 — Dormant web ChatShell still exposes voice controls bound to stale session handlers (HIGH_BUG; REMOVE the dead instance).
F-160 — Sample-lesson buttons can stay permanently disabled after returning to the screen (missing submitting reset).
F-161 — Non-answer substring matching misclassifies substantive answers as non-answers (locale false positives).
F-165 — masteryScore query param not guarded against NaN (completes the BUG-813 sweep).
F-168 — subjectId route param not normalized for the array case (inconsistent with sibling screen).
F-172 — Recall-test submit and 'don't remember' use independent in-flight guards, allowing a double-submit race.
F-175 — Impure side effect (sessionStorage write) executed unconditionally during render.
Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
Each of the 7 findings fixed (F-123: removed) with a co-located regression test; red-green evidence recorded for each fix.
F-123 removal leaves zero orphaned references project-wide (types, imports, handlers, storage keys, commented JSX).
Typecheck, lint, and related tests green; no new i18n keys unless a fix forces a user-visible string (then same-PR en.json + translate).
Risk & blast radius
Low — isolated screen-level fixes + one dead-code removal; out-of-radius vs the identity rewrite; disjoint from WI-621's string surface by scope rule. Watch the F-161 fix for behavior change in answer classification (add table-driven tests covering the locale false-positive cases).
